WeaponTraitDef.label: holoscope
WeaponTraitDef.description: An advanced holographic sight. Its clear reticle speeds up target acquisition and improves accuracy at close to medium range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: red dot scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: A red dot sight with a bright aiming point. It simplifies aiming and improves accuracy at all effective ranges.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 2x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: A 2x optic that makes targets larger and clearer. It helps with precise shots at medium range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 4x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: A 4x optic built for medium to long range. It helps identify distant targets and slightly extends effective range.

WeaponTraitDef.label: 8x scope
WeaponTraitDef.description: An 8x optic for long-range precision. Its high magnification helps the shooter hit targets near the weapon's range limit.
